REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 30, 2025. NO LATER THAN JANUARY 23, 2025 PLAINTIFF TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF LIMITED TO CITATIONS (NO ARGUMENT) TO CONVERSION CASES INVOLVING SIMILAR FACTS, E.G. CONVERSION CASES BROUGHT BY PERSONAL PROPERTY OWNERS ARISING OUT OF FIRE, FLOOD ETC, BASED ON ALLEGATIONS THAT THE ACTIVITY THAT CAUSED FIRE, FLOOD, ETC. MAY RESULT IN DESTRUCTION OF SOMEBODY ELSE'S PERSONAL PROPERTY. IF NO SUCH CASES ARE LOCATED, THE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF SHALL BE FILED STATING "NONE." JUDGE: CHARLES F, HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Continued To Mar-12-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Continued To Jan-30-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT PATRICK SZETO , INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE PES REVOCABLE TRUST DATED APRIL 7, 2011, AS AMENDED, ELAINE SZETO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to January 30, 2025. No later than January 23, 2025 Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief limited to citations (no argument) to conversion cases involving similar facts, e.g. conversion cases brought by personal property owners arising out of fire, flood etc, based on allegations that the activity that caused fire, flood, etc. may result in destruction of somebody else's personal property. If no such cases are located, the supplemental brief shall be filed stating "none."

Judge: Charles F, Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
